title: CVE-2026-32761 - File Browser has an Authorization Policy Bypass in its Public S

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-32761 - File Browser has an Authorization Policy By
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/23
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*perm.download*'
            - '*perm.share*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
